policy: Trusted teacher sources require one Yossi extraction-accuracy pass. Unclear source authority or extraction status should produce targeted confirmation items instead of broad workflow blockers.

confirmation_items.source_name: Loshon HaTorah / Loshon Hakodesh foundation rules, source-modeled JSONL
confirmation_items.unclear_issue: The JSONL is a source-derived internal artifact. It cites Loshon source pages/lessons, but exact record-to-page alignment is not fully confirmed.
confirmation_items.exact_question_for_yossi: Confirm whether this source-modeled JSONL may be treated as trusted source-derived content after checking representative records against the Loshon PDFs.
confirmation_items.recommended_status_after_confirmation: yossi_extraction_verified if the representative source alignment is accurate; otherwise needs_specific_confirmation for the affected records.
